note: Curated recurring highlights at real Nice venues. Dates are relative to today. Each item links to an official source.

events.title: Promenade des Anglais – Seaside Walk
events.description: Iconic seafront boulevard from the port to the airport.

events.title: Vieille Ville – Old Town Labyrinth
events.description: Colourful alleys, baroque churches and socca stalls.

events.title: Colline du Château – Panorama
events.venue: Parc de la Colline du Château
events.description: Hilltop park with waterfall, ruins and bay views.

events.title: Musée Matisse
events.description: Painter's legacy in a Genoese villa amid olive gardens.

events.title: Cours Saleya Market – Flowers & Produce
events.description: Daily market square for flowers, fruit and Niçoise specialities.

events.title: MAMAC – Modern Art on the Hill
events.description: Modern and contemporary art with rooftop terrace over the city.

events.title: Opéra de Nice – Evening Performance
events.description: Belle-époque opera house in the heart of the old town.

events.title: Parc Phoenix – Tropical Greenhouse
events.description: One of Europe's largest greenhouses and lakeside zoo.

events.title: Cinéma Variétés – Art House
events.description: Independent cinema near the port for festival and VO screenings.
